features.evidence: Love the pink color and the screen display is WOWWWW!!!! Set up directly from a connection to my iPhone and done!!I will use this laptop for years - just like my old MacBook Air ❤️❤️❤️❤️
value: display: ['Liquid Retina display', '13.0-inch (diagonal) LED-backlit display with IPS technology; 2408-by-1506 native resolution at 219 pixels per inch', '500 nits brightness', 'Support for 1 billion colors', 'sRGB color']

external display support: ['Supports one external display with up to a native resolution of 4K at 60Hz', 'Simultaneously supports the built-in display at full native resolution', 'USB 3 (USB-C) port supports native DisplayPort 1.4 speeds (up to HBR3)']
battery and power: ['Up to 16 hours video streaming', 'Up to 11 hours wireless web', 'Built-in 36.5-watt-hour lithium-ion battery', '20W USB-C Power Adapter', 'USB-C Charge Cable (1.5 m)']

features.evidence: 5% back with the prime credit card let's go everybody
Note that after setting up Google Chrome, the SSD has about 65GB used, so 256GB storage is good enough if you don't put a lot of stuff on it, if it is a secondary machine anyway
